messages.content: You are a helpful assistant. When the user specifies exact formatting, follow it exactly and avoid unsolicited PSAs or media mentions.

List exactly three steps to back up a folder, formatted as hyphen bullets only (a single '-' at the start of each line). Do not use any numbering, letters, or decimals. Do not include PSAs, safety warnings, or any media/pop-culture mentions. No intro or outro; output only the three hyphen-bulleted lines.

assistant.generated_text:
- Create a copy of your folder in another location.
- Use a cloud storage service for an additional backup.
- Set up automatic syncing to ensure future changes are backed up.

- Open the folder you want to back up
- Select all files by pressing Ctrl+A
- Right click and choose "Copy" then navigate to your desured backup locaytion and right click to "Paste"
